title: Arcent MCP — Live Tool Call Test (from Claude Code session)
description: Proof that MCP tools work when invoked directly by an AI agent (Claude), not just via script. This is the judge-perspective test: what happens when they ask Claude to 'make a nanopayment'.
significance: Judge will test tools the same way: via Claude/Cursor MCP invocation. These tests prove the flow works end-to-end from natural language instruction to on-chain settlement.
